hero.title: Pub Marketing for Surrey Pubs
hero.subtitle: With around 1,000 pubs across Surrey competing for commuter trade, weekend footfall, and race day crowds, you need to stand out locally. We know — we run The Anchor in Stanwell Moor.
hero.ctaText: Hi Peter, I run a pub in Surrey and need help
hero.bottomText: £75/hour + VAT • From a working Surrey licensee who gets it

intro.heading: We run a Surrey pub — here's what actually works
paragraphs: We're not outsiders guessing. Peter runs The Anchor in Stanwell Moor, right on the Surrey border near Staines and the M25. We deal with the same challenges you do: commuters who vanish by 7pm, weekday quiet spells, and the constant pull of Wetherspoons in town centres.

Surrey's pub market splits roughly three ways: station pubs chasing the after-work crowd, village locals building community trade, and destination venues competing with the gastropubs in Guildford, Woking, and Farnham. Each needs a different approach.

We fix the basics first — your Google profile, photos, and reviews — then build a repeatable system around what actually drives trade in your part of Surrey: whether that's commuter lunches near the M25, summer garden sessions, or Epsom and Kempton race day crowds.

wins.heading: What's working for Surrey pubs right now

items.title: Capture the commuter belt
items.description: Surrey station pubs and M25-corridor venues can build reliable weekday lunch and after-work trade with the right Google positioning and a clear midweek offer.

items.title: Win the summer garden search
items.description: When the sun comes out, 'pub with beer garden near me' spikes across Surrey. Make sure your photos, Google categories, and social posts are ready before the first warm weekend.

items.title: Race day and seasonal peaks
items.description: Epsom Derby week, Kempton race days, and Christmas party season are massive for nearby pubs. We build pre-event campaigns that fill tables and capture future bookings.

items.title: Compete with the gastropubs
items.description: You don't need a tasting menu to compete in affluent Surrey. Clear positioning, strong reviews, and a consistent social presence beat a fancy menu that nobody knows about.

links.title: Start with pub marketing fundamentals
links.description: A practical overview and the best next page based on your biggest problem.

links.title: Build midweek momentum
links.description: Proven systems to build regulars and consistent Tuesday–Wednesday trade — crucial for Surrey commuter pubs.

links.title: Stop falling trade
links.description: A focused 30-day plan to get momentum back quickly.

faqs.question: Do you actually know the Surrey pub market?
faqs.answer: Yes — we run The Anchor in Stanwell Moor, near Staines and the M25. We deal with the same challenges: commuter patterns, Wetherspoons competition, and seasonal swings. Everything we recommend, we've tested ourselves.

faqs.question: Can you help with race day and event marketing?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Epsom and Kempton race days are big opportunities for nearby pubs. We build pre-event social campaigns, Google posts, and booking systems so you capture trade before, during, and after race days.

faqs.question: How do I compete with gastropubs in Guildford and Woking?
faqs.answer: You don't need to out-menu them. Most gastropubs are weak on Google presence and consistency. We help you show up for the searches they miss, build stronger reviews, and create repeatable events that build loyalty.

cta.title: Let's talk about your Surrey pub
cta.subtitle: Tell me where your pub is and what's hurting trade. As a fellow Surrey licensee, I'll give you a straight answer on what to fix first.
cta.whatsappMessage: Hi Peter, I run a pub in Surrey and I need help with marketing. Can we have a quick chat?
